name: Eslam Saeed Ahmed Al-Wajeeh
title: Senior AML & Financial Compliance Specialist
summary: A highly experienced financial compliance professional with deep expertise in Anti-Money Laundering (AML), Counter-Terrorism Financing (CTF), and international banking regulations. Proven track record in the Yemeni banking and remittance sector with certifications from top regional institutions.

experience.title: AML Compliance Officer
responsibilities: Developed and implemented AML/CFT compliance frameworks
Conducted KYC/CDD due diligence for high-risk customers
Monitored suspicious transactions and filed STRs
Trained staff on AML regulations and best practices

experience.title: Compliance Analyst
responsibilities: Managed domestic and international remittance compliance
Ensured FATF and OFAC sanctions screening
Prepared regulatory reports for the Central Bank of Yemen
